caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a wooden podium equipped with two gooseneck microphones, delivering a speech against a textured, green stone wall with a stepped geometric pattern. He is dressed in a light-colored traditional Indian outfit consisting of a long-sleeved kurta and a matching sleeveless Nehru jacket. Behind him, vertical gold-colored decorative columns are accented with small red flowers. As the sequence progresses, he uses various hand gestures to emphasize his points. He begins by gesturing with his right hand, then shifts to gesturing with his left. Subsequently, he raises his right hand with his index finger pointed upward, and finally, he raises both arms wide in an open gesture. The setting remains constant throughout the sequence, with only his posture and hand movements changing as he speaks.
